    Description

    DataDefinitionBuilder

    Adds a common data field.
    DataDefinitionBuilder

    Adds a field linked to another dataDefinition (aka foreign key).
    DataDefinitionBuilder

    Adds an ID field.
    static DataDefinitionBuilder

    DataDefinitionBuilder

    Sets the dataSpace to which the dataDefinition belongs.
    DataDefinitionBuilder
    DataDefinitionBuilder.withDisplayField(String displayFieldName)
    Specifies which field to be used for display
    DataDefinitionBuilder
    DataDefinitionBuilder.withFragment(DataDefinition fragment)
    Sets fragment
    DataDefinitionBuilder
    DataDefinitionBuilder.withHandleField(String handleFieldName)
    Specifies which field to be used for handle
    DataDefinitionBuilder
    DataDefinitionBuilder.withKeyField(String keyFieldName)
    Specifies which field to be used to distinguish elements inside a collection
    DataDefinitionBuilder
    DataDefinitionBuilder.withPackageName(String packageName)
    Sets packageName
    DataDefinitionBuilder

    Specifies which field to be used for sorting
